purpose: Canonical machine-readable contract connecting digital downloads, services, subscriptions, the Knowledge Library, Shopify cart behavior, customer entitlements, and Kairos fulfillment.

system_boundaries.knowledge_library: Shared digital-asset catalog and selection surface used by the public storefront, subscribers, and authenticated customer libraries.

entitlement_ownership_persistence_contra.confirmation_transaction: window confirmation, delivery grants, ownership grants, cycle counters, and audit events commit or roll back together

digital_download.subscription_eligibility: Per-product boolean metadata field; only approved digital downloads may enter the subscription catalog after all Knowledge Library release gates pass.

media_behavior.variant_selected: Replace the primary product media with the selected tier image.
media_behavior.gallery_rule: Do not display all three tier images as permanent gallery thumbnails.
media_behavior.cart_rule: Use the selected tier image for the cart line and checkout line where Shopify supports variant media.

plans.cadence_note: Four scheduled packages per monthly billing cycle; entitlement does not vary in five-week calendar months.

first_delivery_flow.checkout_selection: Customer selects the subscription plan only; title selection does not occur inside checkout.

future_delivery_flow.customer_action: Review and swap eligible titles before delivery closes.

mutation_rules: Customer, subscription, and window identity are derived from the authenticated server session.
Every mutation requires a request ID and expected window version.
Confirmation requires the exact target asset count and complete unit consumption.
Confirmed selections are locked and become delivery-grant inputs.
Confirmation, delivery grants, ownership grants, cycle accounting, and audit events are one atomic database transaction.

my_library.identity_rule: Display one customer-facing entry per canonical asset_id.
my_library.ownership_authority: An active non-revoked mmg_ownership_grants record keyed by customer_id and asset_id.

offer_and_entitlement_engine.name: Kairos Offer & Entitlement Engine
rules: Never silently add a recurring product to the cart.
Require an explicit customer plan selection and confirmation.
Do not recommend an asset the customer already owns.
Do not use Shopify Bundles as the subscription entitlement foundation.
Use one canonical asset record across storefront, library, portal, recommendations, and delivery.
Treat storefront eligibility as provisional until Kairos revalidates the customer, ownership, entitlement window, and delivery readiness.
Use optimistic concurrency and idempotency for every title-selection mutation.
Create confirmation and delivery grants transactionally.
Resolve ownership from durable active grants rather than browser state.
Never allow entitlement units or package counts to exceed the locked plan contract.

site_placements.homepage: Present digital resources, professional services, and membership as three connected paths.
site_placements.knowledge_library: Primary subscription discovery and title-selection surface with the reusable entitlement counter.
site_placements.digital_product_page: Offer one-time purchase and a reusable build-your-library membership module.
site_placements.service_product_page: Keep the service conversion primary; place membership in Continue Your Journey.
site_placements.publishing_services_landing_page: Lead with service outcomes and connect to relevant education and membership secondarily.
site_placements.membership_landing_page: Explain plans, entitlements, onboarding, first-title selection, curation, review windows, and My Library.
site_placements.cart_drawer_and_cart_page: Show an unselected subscription invitation when no subscription is present; open the three-plan selector on customer action.
site_placements.thank_you_page: For new subscribers, direct the customer to choose the first two titles.
site_placements.customer_portal: Show plan, next delivery, current entitlement, review window, selected titles, delivered titles, My Library, and account controls.
